Macro Pad PCB

A hardware project combining industrial design, input ergonomics, and PCB planning.

PersonalBuildPrototype
Back Home

Overview

This project is intended to showcase a mix of enclosure design, electronics integration, and user interface thinking. It can later include schematics, PCB renders, firmware notes, and prototype photos.
